sub_modules.gd_poly_derivative: Pure combinational fixed-point derivative calculator. Computes gradient = ((2*a*x) >>> M) + b using sign-extended wide intermediates.
sub_modules.gd_poly_step: Pure combinational fixed-point learning-rate multiplier. Computes step = (alpha * gradient) >>> M with widened signed arithmetic.
sub_modules.gd_poly_update: Pure combinational update block. Computes next_x = current_x - step and returns the wrapped N-bit fixed-point result.
